summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kara Business Service landing page. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly including contact form, AI chatbot with GPT-5.2, navigation, and responsive design.
passed_tests: Contact form API (POST /api/contact) - successful submission and validation
AI Chatbot API (POST /api/chat) - GPT-5.2 integration working with session continuity
Homepage sections loading - Hero, Services, Benefits, Contact, Footer all present
Navigation menu functionality - smooth scroll to sections working
Contact form submission - successful form fill and API integration
AI Chatbot interface - opens, sends messages, receives AI responses
Mobile responsiveness - mobile menu and layout working correctly
